notes: Focus on increasing volume and keeping the left shoulder safe. Strict form, tempo control, and tracking heart rate.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Floor Press
exercises.notes: RPE 7-8. Elbows touch the floor softly. 100% safe for left shoulder.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raises
exercises.notes: RPE <= 7. Strict control, focus on lateral deltoid.

exercises.name: Incline Push-ups on Rack
exercises.notes: Hands on the barbell/dips bar on the rack. Keep elbows tucked in.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.notes: EMOM Format. Perform 15 explosive swings at the start of the minute, then rest for the remainder. Put your SilaVit nasal strip on!

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.notes: Tempo 3-0-1-0. 3 seconds slow eccentric lowering. Keep torso upright.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges
exercises.notes: Step firmly, maintain balance, continuous movement.

exercises.name: Gymbeam Stepper Calves
exercises.notes: Stand on the stepper edge. Max stretch at the bottom, hard squeeze at top.

exercises.name: Ab Roller
exercises.notes: Keep lower back rounded, engage core fully, do not overextend.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Use KingsBox Adjustable Handles (Size L) or narrow bar. Strict neutral grip. Keep shoulder stable.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.notes: Use the solid steel triangle handle. Keep elbows close to torso, squeeze shoulder blades.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.notes: Upper pulley with rope/band. Pull towards ears, external rotation. Essential for left shoulder rehab.

workouts.name: Trening D (REST)
workouts.notes: No workout planned for this day.
